resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of three trigger types: time-based (24h before), event-based (booking confirmed), and condition-based (payment due). While the evidence includes event-based and condition-based triggers through the booking confirmation and payment due messages, there is no evidence of a time-based trigger being implemented or tested, which constitutes a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of time-based trigger (24h before) implementation.
